generated: Warranty story generated — tap Audit Story when ready for MI scoring
generatedRevision: Story improved with tech details — tap Audit Story to refresh the score
roNotLoaded: Repair order not loaded — go back and reopen the line
lineNotFound: Repair line not found — refresh the RO and try again
clearCustomerPayFirst: Clear Customer Pay mode first to generate a warranty story with AI.
scoreWaitGenerate: Wait for story generation to finish before auditing
scoreNeedStory: Generate or write a warranty story before running the audit
scoreStale: Story changed during audit — run Audit Story again.
scoreCustomerPaySkip: Customer Pay stories skip AI audit — edit the text if needed.
loadingScoringBody: Scoring story against MI 2.0 audit criteria…
scoreOutdatedBody: This story was edited after the last audit. Run Audit Story to refresh the MI quality score.
feedbackMissing: Detailed MI feedback did not load. Tap Audit Story again to refresh the green, yellow, and red coaching sections.
techDetailsHint: {{mi}} flagged these gaps. Add All Tech Details weaves each fix into the story at the correct diagnostic step. Then tap Audit Story immediately — the score should rise and fixed items should drop off. Optional: Generate to polish wording.
hintNotAudited: Run Audit Story before you can certify or copy to CDK.
hintAudited: MI audit complete — certify below to unlock Copy for CDK.
hintStale: Story changed since the last audit — re-run Audit Story before copying.
hintCertified: Story audited and certified — Copy for CDK is enabled.
certDisclaimer: I have personally reviewed and edited the AI-assisted warranty story above. I confirm that it accurately reflects the diagnosis, testing, and repairs performed on this vehicle. I take full responsibility for the accuracy and truthfulness of this claim.
certPendingReaudit: You edited the story after the last audit. Tap Audit Story above to refresh the MI score, then complete certification below.
certCheckbox: I have reviewed and verified this story
certNameLabel: Type your full name to certify
certIncompleteHint: MI audit is complete. Check the box and enter your full name to certify — Copy for CDK stays locked until certification is saved.
cpApplyLabel: Customer Pay — applies instantly, no AI
saveTemplateHint: Your approved story trains future Grok generations for this dealership.
templateTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Blind Spot Assist — S-Class Software Update
storyPreviewHint: Grok draft is stored separately so the system learns what you changed.
templateSaved: Template "{{title}}" saved — Grok will learn from this story
librarySubtitle: Customer Pay = instant · Warranty = insert or generate with AI
noTemplatesHint: Try a different keyword or switch between warranty and customer pay tabs.
